name: mondula_form
title: Complete a Multi-Page Form on Mondula
description: Fill a real multi-step form with text fields, date inputs, radios, checkboxes, dropdowns, and final contact details.
prompt: Go to mondula.com/msf-demo, complete each page, fill at least 6 input fields, and reach the submit-ready final step.

steps.caption: Step 1: Open the Mondula multi-step form demo page
steps.description: Open the Mondula multi-step form demo page
steps.narration: Let's start by opening the Mondula multi-step form demo page. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

steps.caption: Step 2: Move from the intro page to the first form step
steps.description: Move from the intro page to the first form step
steps.narration: Next, we move from the intro page to the first form step. It keeps the viewer oriented instead of jumping around too abruptly.

steps.caption: Step 3: Fill first page text and textarea fields
steps.description: Fill first page text and textarea fields
steps.narration: From there, we fill first page text and textarea fields. This is exactly the repetitive work automation should steal from us.

steps.caption: Step 4: Go to the next page with additional input fields
steps.description: Go to the next page with additional input fields
steps.narration: Now we go to the next page with additional input fields. That keeps the sequence moving while the context still feels fresh.

steps.caption: Step 5: Fill text, custom textarea, and date fields on page two
steps.description: Fill text, custom textarea, and date fields on page two
steps.narration: After that, we fill text, custom textarea, and date fields on page two. This is exactly the repetitive work automation should steal from us.

steps.caption: Step 6: Proceed to radio, checkbox, and dropdown inputs
steps.description: Proceed to radio, checkbox, and dropdown inputs
steps.narration: Next, we proceed to radio, checkbox, and dropdown inputs. It keeps the flow easy to follow without sounding like a checklist.

steps.caption: Step 7: Select a radio option, multiple checkboxes, and a dropdown value
steps.description: Select a radio option, multiple checkboxes, and a dropdown value
steps.narration: From there, we select a radio option, multiple checkboxes, and a dropdown value. This keeps the flow deterministic instead of relying on page defaults.

steps.caption: Step 8: Open the conditional input section
steps.narration: Now we open the conditional input section. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

steps.caption: Step 9: Fill conditional fields based on the selected dish
steps.description: Fill conditional fields based on the selected dish
steps.narration: After that, we fill conditional fields based on the selected dish. This is exactly the repetitive work automation should steal from us.

steps.caption: Step 10: Move to the final contact-details page
steps.description: Move to the final contact-details page
steps.narration: Next, we move to the final contact-details page. It keeps the viewer oriented instead of jumping around too abruptly.

steps.caption: Step 11: Fill final contact page with six required input fields
steps.description: Fill final contact page with six required input fields
steps.narration: From there, we fill final contact page with six required input fields. This is exactly the repetitive work automation should steal from us.

steps.caption: Step 12: Review summary and reach submit-ready final state
steps.description: Review summary and reach submit-ready final state
steps.narration: Now we review summary and reach submit-ready final state. This is where the screen starts telling a story instead of just showing raw numbers.
